sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2251" key="ai)doii+ko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰδοιϊκός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n2251.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of or belonging to the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αἰδοῖα</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:50:5:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.5.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
